---
title: "dataexploration"
author: "rwo"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Data Exploration

```{r}
library(readr)
DATA_Problematic_Mobile_Phone_Use_CAT <- read_csv("scripts/DATA_Problematic Mobile Phone Use CAT.csv")
View(DATA_Problematic_Mobile_Phone_Use_CAT)

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
df <- DATA_Problematic_Mobile_Phone_Use_CAT

# Compute scale totals
df$NMP_total   <- rowSums(df[, grep('^NMP_',  names(df))])
df$SAPS_total  <- rowSums(df[, grep('^SAPS_', names(df))])
df$SPAI_total  <- rowSums(df[, grep('^SPAI_', names(df))])
df$MPAS_total  <- rowSums(df[, grep('^MPAS_', names(df))])
df$MPATS_total <- rowSums(df[, grep('^MPATS', names(df))])
df$SAS_total   <- rowSums(df[, grep('^SAS_',  names(df))])

# Readable labels
df$gender_label <- ifelse(df$gender == 1, "Male", "Female")
df$gender_label <- factor(df$gender_label, levels = c("Male", "Female"))

scale_labels <- c(
  NMP_total   = "NMP\n(Nomophobia)",
  SAPS_total  = "SAPS\n(Addiction Proneness)",
  SPAI_total  = "SPAI\n(Addiction Inventory)",
  MPAS_total  = "MPAS\n(Addiction Scale)",
  MPATS_total = "MPATS\n(Tendency Scale)",
  SAS_total   = "SAS\n(Addiction Scale)"
)

palette_main  <- "#4C72B0"
palette_fem   <- "#DD8452"
palette_male  <- "#4C72B0"
```

```{r}
theme_clean <- theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey40"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.title       = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position  = "none"
  )
```

```{r}
p1 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = age, fill = gender_label)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, color = "white", alpha = 0.85, position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Male" = palette_male, "Female" = palette_fem)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Age Distribution by Gender",
    subtitle = paste0("n = ", nrow(df), "  |  Ages 14–36"),
    x = "Age (years)", y = "Count", fill = "Gender"
  ) +
  theme_clean +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
p1
```

```{r}
gender_counts <- as.data.frame(table(df$gender_label))
names(gender_counts) <- c("Gender", "Count")
gender_counts$Pct <- round(100 * gender_counts$Count / sum(gender_counts$Count), 1)

p2 <- ggplot(gender_counts, aes(x = Gender, y = Count, fill = Gender)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Count, "\n(", Pct, "%)")),
            vjust = -0.3, size = 4.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Male" = palette_male, "Female" = palette_fem)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  labs(title = "Sample Gender Breakdown",
       subtitle = paste0("Total n = ", nrow(df)),
       x = NULL, y = "Count") +
  theme_clean
p2
```

```{r}
spai_mean <- mean(df$SPAI_total)
spai_sd   <- sd(df$SPAI_total)

p3 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = SPAI_total)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), binwidth = 2,
                 fill = palette_main, color = "white", alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_density(color = "#C44E52", linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = spai_mean, linetype = "dashed",
             color = "black", linewidth = 0.9) +
  annotate("text", x = spai_mean + 1.5, y = Inf,
           label = paste0("Mean = ", round(spai_mean, 1)),
           vjust = 1.5, hjust = 0, size = 4, color = "black") +
  labs(
    title    = "Distribution of SPAI Total Score (Outcome Variable)",
    subtitle = paste0("Mean = ", round(spai_mean,1),
                      "  |  SD = ", round(spai_sd,1),
                      "  |  Range: 20–80"),
    x = "SPAI Total Score", y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_clean
p3
```

```{r}
scales_long <- melt(
  df[, c("NMP_total","SAPS_total","SPAI_total","MPAS_total","MPATS_total","SAS_total")],
  variable.name = "Scale", value.name = "Score"
)
scales_long$Scale <- factor(scales_long$Scale,
                            levels = names(scale_labels),
                            labels = scale_labels)

p4 <- ggplot(scales_long, aes(x = Score, fill = Scale)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 25,
                 color = "white", alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_density(color = "#C44E52", linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ Scale, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    title    = "Score Distributions for All Six Scales",
    subtitle = "Histogram + kernel density overlay",
    x = "Scale Score", y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_clean +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"))
p4
```

```{r}
scales_long2 <- melt(
  df[, c("gender_label","NMP_total","SAPS_total","SPAI_total",
         "MPAS_total","MPATS_total","SAS_total")],
  id.vars      = "gender_label",
  variable.name = "Scale", value.name = "Score"
)
scales_long2$Scale <- factor(scales_long2$Scale,
                             levels = names(scale_labels),
                             labels = scale_labels)

p5 <- ggplot(scales_long2, aes(x = Scale, y = Score, fill = gender_label)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.8, outlier.alpha = 0.4, alpha = 0.85,
               width = 0.55, position = position_dodge(0.65)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Male" = palette_male, "Female" = palette_fem)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Scale Score Distributions by Gender",
    subtitle = "Box = IQR, line = median, whiskers = 1.5×IQR",
    x = NULL, y = "Scale Total Score", fill = "Gender"
  ) +
  theme_clean +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.text.x     = element_text(size = 9))
p5
```
